title: Aureline transport remediation card
description: Wrapper boundary schema for an export-safe transport remediation card. Support/export packets and inspector export flows validate remediation cards against this schema so a blocked path yields an actionable next step instead of generic connectivity copy. The wrapper intentionally reuses the existing inspector and trust remediation records without minting a parallel vocabulary: it accepts either a transport_denial_record (typed denial surface with required remediation actions and repair boundary) or a network_remediation_card_record (trust-focused remediation card linked 1:1 to a trust_proof_packet_record). Raw URLs, raw host names, raw IP addresses, proxy credentials, PAC bodies, certificate PEM, private keys, raw SSH keys, tokens, request bodies, and response bodies never cross this boundary.
